title: erophila verna subsp. oblongata
intro: Erophila verna subsp. oblongata, also known as small wintercress, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the Brassicaceae family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Erophila verna subsp. oblongata include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Erophila verna subsp. oblongata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a food source.
